privileged_info_summary: The source product 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' exists with SKU WBH-001, priced at $79.99, with description 'Premium wireless Bluetooth headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and comfortable over-ear design.' The task requires creating a duplicate with SKU WBH-001-GOLD, name 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones - Gold Edition', price $129.99, and catalog visibility set to 'Search results only' (represented by the 'exclude-from-catalog' taxonomy term in WooCommerce). The product must be published. All data is synthetically generated for the WooCommerce test environment via WP-CLI.
